title: Moroccan Seffa Pie
description: A rich and dense Moroccan pie with a variety of spices, perfect for a special occasion or dinner party.
instructions: Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch, and place it in a 9-inch pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumbled seffa, spiced sugar, melted butter, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, and salt.
Add the beaten eggs to the seffa mixture and mix until well combined.
Pour the seffa mixture into the pie crust and smooth the top.
Bake the pie for 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove the pie from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Dust the pie with confectioners' sugar before serving.
